home.title: Discover Amazing Events

cart.title: Shopping Cart

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete your purchase in just a few steps
checkout.cartEmptyMessage: Add some tickets to get started!
checkout.contactMessage: We'll send your tickets to this email address. Make sure it's correct!
checkout.emailNote: 📧 Your tickets and receipt will be sent here
checkout.fullNameNote: Name as it appears on your ID
checkout.secureInfoNote: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal data.
checkout.securePaymentNote: All transactions are encrypted and processed securely through our trusted payment partners. We never store your full payment details.
checkout.reviewMessage: Please review all details before completing your purchase.
checkout.termsNote: By completing this purchase, you agree to our Terms of Service and acknowledge our Refund Policy. Please review the event's specific policies before proceeding.
checkout.loginRequired: Please login to complete your booking
checkout.invalidEventOrTicket: Invalid event or ticket type ID
checkout.paymentInitFailed: Failed to initiate payment. Please try again.
checkout.bookingCreateFailed: Failed to create booking. Please try again.

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.subtitle: Your tickets have been confirmed and sent to
success.emailSent: We've sent your tickets and receipt to
success.emailNote: Make sure to check your spam folder if you don't see it within a few minutes.
success.ticketsAvailable: Your tickets are also available in the "My Tickets" section of your account.
success.step1: Save your tickets to your phone or print them out
success.step2: Arrive at the venue early to avoid queues
success.step3: Present your QR code at the entrance for scanning
success.step4: Bring a valid ID that matches the name on your ticket

organizer.title: Apply to Become an Event Organizer
organizer.description: Create and manage your own events on Tickify. Fill in the information below to submit your request.
organizer.additionalInfo: Description / Reason for Becoming an Organizer
organizer.errorMessage: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
organizer.successDescription: Your request has been submitted. Admin will review and approve it as soon as possible. You will receive an email notification when approved.
organizer.formDescription: Please provide accurate information about your organization
organizer.descriptionPlaceholder: Introduce your organization and the type of events you want to organize...
organizer.requiredNote: * Required information. Request will be reviewed within 24-48 hours.
organizer.alreadyOrganizerDesc: Your account already has permission to create and manage events.
organizer.benefit1Desc: Organize as many events as you want
